prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document provides statistics and information concerning police powers, procedures, and motoring offences specifically within England and Wales, indicating its applicability to both nations. However, since it is published by the Home Office, which operates in England, it primarily targets an English audience.
